commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh This is the water of Meribah, because the children of Israel strove with the LORD, and he was sanctified among them. The water of contradiction or strife. Hebrew Meribah. (Challoner) Sanctified: he showed the effects of his power and clemency towards the people, and he treated his ministers with a just severity. The Samaritan copy here inserts what we read in Deuteronomy, only it places the speech of Moses in an historical form. "The Moses said, Lord (Deuteronomy iii. ) Moreover, the Lord said to Moses, you shall pass by "(Deuteronomy ii.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The Water of contradiction: Or strife. Hebrew, Meribah.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
